title: Pixelmon Jenny
description: The Weenies try pixelmon one more time.
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmom_Jenny/BH_PmJ_header.webp)
[![Banner BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmom_Jenny/BH_PmJ_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmom_Jenny/BH_PmJ_overview.webp)
---
**Pixelmon Jenny** is a... Ah to hell with a proper description, buckle up dweebs the pixelmon modpack you've always dreamed of is finally here. That's right you read that name correctly and you saw those images, jump into your dreams of Pokémon X 2D Waifus.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/pixelmon-jenny)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pixelmon-jenny)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Unique World Generation** - Powered by Oh The Biomes Weve Gone.
- [✔️] **Nothing But Pokémon** - "I want to be the very best", who knows maybe you can! Enjoy a world filled with Pokémon.
- [✔️] **Waifu's** - Enjoy a variety of different bed themed waifus, can't get them in real-life but 2D is wayyy better.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Pixelmom_Jenny/BH_PmJ_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
